_comment: Declarative MCP server registration. Claude Code spawns `guide mcp` when the plugin is enabled. GUIDE_HARNESS tags every walk record; GUIDE_SCOPE is resolved by the runtime from $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR at MCP-server startup. GUIDE_HOME / GUIDE_LIBRARY_PATH / GUIDE_STATE_PATH fall through to the runtime defaults under ~/.guide/ unless the operator overrides via shell env.
